mapper.insert:
SELECT "seq_user_no".NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO "user" ("user_no", "id", "password", "name", "social", "profile_image_path", "is_dark", "created_dt", "delete_flag") VALUES (#{userNo}, #{id}, #{password}, #{name}, #{social}, NULL, 0, SYSDATE, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT "user_no" AS userNo, "id", "password", "name", "social", "profile_image_path" AS profileImagePath, "is_dark" AS isDark, "created_dt" AS createdDt, "delete_flag" AS deleteFlag FROM "user" WHERE "user_no" = #{userNo} AND "delete_flag" = 0

SELECT "user_no" AS userNo, "id", "password", "name", "social", "profile_image_path" AS profileImagePath, "is_dark" AS isDark, "created_dt" AS createdDt, "delete_flag" AS deleteFlag FROM "user" WHERE "delete_flag" = 0 ORDER BY "user_no" DESC OFFSET (#{page} - 1) * #{size} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
